    The number of batteries that must be removed to confirm the use of double engines.

    The declared power of the player, which is the amount of power they intend to use.

    The declared power of the player.
    declaresDouble(String, DoubleType, double) - Method in class Controller.CombatZone.Level_ONE.CombatZone1EngineDeclarationState
    Allows a player to declare their total engine during the combat zone phase.

    Handles a player's declaration of fire power during the combat phase.

    declaresDouble(String, DoubleType, double) - Method in class Controller.OpenSpace.OpenSpaceEngineDeclarationState
    Called when a player declares the use of double components, such as engines.
    declaresDouble(String, DoubleType, double) - Method in class Controller.Pirates.PiratesPowerDeclarationState
    Handles the declaration of power from a player in the form of cannon plus double cannons.
    declaresDouble(String, DoubleType, double) - Method in class Controller.Slavers.SlaversPowerDeclarationState
    Allows a player to declare the number of double cannons they wish to use.
    declaresDouble(String, DoubleType, double) - Method in class Controller.Smugglers.SmugglersPowerDeclarationState
    Allows the current player to declare how many cannons they will use against the smugglers.

    defaultAmount - Variable in class Controller.Context
    Represents the default amount of resources, such as goods or crewmates, that can be used in various game scenarios, usually for enemies.
